category_sources: Official uriparser site describes the same C99 URI parsing and handling library.
source_facts.description says it is a strictly RFC 3986 compliant URI parsing library.
display_name_sources: Official site title identifies the project as uriparser.
docs_sources: Official API documentation is hosted under the uriparser GitHub Pages domain.
Official homepage is the project overview.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/uriparser/uriparser, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official site describes C99, cross-platform URI parsing and handling.
